findings.location: source: 内部構造・改修時の留意点
findings.description: The entire '内部構造・改修時の留意点' section is absent from the knowledge file. This section specifies: (1) the widget tag file path `/WEB-INF/tags/widget/button/*.tag`; (2) the JavaScript tag library stub file `/js/jsp/taglib/nablarch.js` along with the list of tags it emulates for local operation (`n:button`, `n:popupButton`, `n:downloadButton`); and (3) the CSS file `/css/style/base.less` which contains button style definitions.
findings.source_evidence: 部品一覧テーブル: /WEB-INF/tags/widget/button/*.tag → button_submit; /js/jsp/taglib/nablarch.js → ボタンウィジェットが使用する n:button, n:popupButton, n:downloadButton のエミュレーション機能を実装するタグライブラリスタブJS; /css/style/base.less → ボタンに関する定義を含む基本HTMLスタイル定義

findings.description: The `id` attribute (htmlのid属性) appears in the first row of the common attributes table in the source but is not listed in s1's hints.
findings.source_evidence: 属性値一覧 共通属性テーブル第1行: id | htmlのid属性 | 文字列 | ○ | ○
